_comment: Odoo series -> supported/recommended Python version. Sourced from Odoo setup.py / release.py / official install docs (v8-v19). 'min'/'max' are the officially supported range; 'recommended' is the most stable dev choice. 'python2' marks series that require Python 2.7 (EOL - no Python 3). Consumers: scripts/setup-steps/40-instance-profile.sh and scripts/setup-steps/45-venv.sh (read 'recommended' and 'python2' keys).
